headline: Legal Probe Puts Monolithic Power Systems Governance And Growth Story Under Review
summary: The Schall Law Firm has launched an investigation into Monolithic Power Systems' (NasdaqGS:MPWR) directors and management. The probe focuses on potential breaches of fiduciary duty and whether the board fulfilled its responsibilities to shareholders. The investigation could lead to litigation or changes in corporate governance practices depending on the findings. Monolithic Power Systems focuses on analog and mixed-signal power solutions, supplying components that sit inside a wide range of...
